title: Entertainment Technology Standards
description: Comprehensive coverage of ANSI/ESTA standards for entertainment technology including rigging, electrical, and laser-specific performance standards. Deep dive into ANSI Z136 series and ANSI E1.46 entertainment laser standard with certification preparation.
learningObjectives: Navigate the complete ANSI Z136 series and identify applicable standards for any laser application
Apply ESTA E1.46 entertainment laser standard requirements to show planning and installations
Implement hierarchy of controls following ANSI Z136.1 requirements
Develop comprehensive standards compliance documentation for regulatory authorities
Prepare for CLSO and CMLSO certification examinations
Maintain compliance matrices and audit documentation
Coordinate with regulatory authorities and inspection bodies
